refnamediv.refpurpose: Sets the isnodata flag of the band to TRUE.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Sets the isnodata flag for the band to true. Band 1 is assumed if not specified. This function should be called only when the flag is considered dirty. That is, when the result calling is different using TRUE as last argument and without using it

refsection.title: Examples
